---
title: "Part 4：Attention 机制与 Transformer"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - ../ch8-attention-and-transformer/*.qmd
    - ../ch10-efficient-attention/*.qmd
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part4-attention-mechanism-and-transformer
  description: "Part 4: Attention Mechanism and Transformer"
---
